top_10.rationale: SimCLR PDF (ICML 2020) — the defining contrastive self-supervised learning paper, direct PDF from the proceedings, canonical and most-cited primary source.
Supervised Contrastive Learning PDF (NeurIPS 2020) — extends contrastive SSL to supervised setting, foundational paper available as direct PDF from NeurIPS proceedings.
TKDE survey PDF 'Self-supervised Learning: Generative or Contrastive' — comprehensive review of SSL methods across CV, NLP, and graph learning; authoritative survey PDF.
NeurIPS 2021 Tutorial on Self-Supervised Learning PDF — tutorial slides from NeurIPS covering self-prediction and contrastive methods, authoritative conference tutorial.
Survey PDF 'Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning: A Survey on Different Architectures' — covers generative and contrastive SSL integration and architectural trade-offs.
arxiv PDF 'Understanding Self-supervised Contrastive Learning through Supervised...' — theoretical framework explaining prototype representation bias and balanced contrastive loss.
Springer PDF on contrastive self-supervised representation learning with synthetic data — peer-reviewed PDF covering the learning framework for discriminative representations.
CVPR 2024 paper PDF on self-supervised representation learning from arbitrary scenarios — combines contrastive learning and masked image modeling, state-of-the-art 2024 approach.
arxiv 'Rethinking Minimal Sufficient Representation in Contrastive Learning' — examines theoretical foundations of view-based contrastive self-supervised representation learning.
arxiv version of Supervised Contrastive Learning — complements the NeurIPS PDF with the preprint version, ensuring coverage of this key paper.
